estimand_note: Objects stored under h_obs that name a tested policy are policy deltas, not proofs of the maximized H_obs estimand. H_PI values are restricted to the stated action/comparator portfolio unless explicitly certified otherwise.
scope: Audited Track A through K3 arc plus the subsequent equal-team bottleneck-migration screen

warnings: The K3 corrective verdict is now an ancestor of origin/codex/paper2-maintenance-headroom, but it remains absent from the Program-I remote branch and draft PR 2.

Concurrent commit a91890bf is present on the origin codex branch and labels the search terminal even though the integrated M/T/R family still lacks the full-horizon frontier and a resource-restricted PI ceiling.
Local codex/garrido-replication-experiments is one commit ahead of its remote.
The K3 corrective commit is tagged program-k3-retraction-2026-07-13.
Program-H prose saying no Programs I-K could proceed was later superseded by executed Programs I-K.
Superseded K3 confirmation/PPO JSON files retain positive booleans; machine readers must honor superseded_by and effective_verdict in the corrective artifact.

decision_families.primary_metric: ret_excel_visible_v1 (current governing metric; legacy Track-A ret_excel compatibility is not assumed)
decision_families.physical_mechanism: Thesis-grounded inventory/buffer and shift controls across upstream MFSC operations
decision_families.decision_rights: Five effective quantity/ROP/shift dimensions; the disclosed Op5 quantity dimension is inert in the tested initialization

h_pi.metric: ret_excel in the most favorable 5D campaign gate
h_pi.warning: below the current 0.01 practical gate and selected from development regimes

decision_families.strongest_comparator: same-action static frontier over the effective 5D grid; threshold and efficient-frontier policies
decision_families.resource_matching: later conservation-aware gate; earlier comparisons include service/resource tradeoffs and are not promotion evidence
decision_families.guardrail_result: PPO loses to the best held-out static in all five seeds; retained-minus-reset CI crosses zero
decision_families.exact_failure: The thesis-grounded action family has regime-specific static rankings, but a conservation-aware PPO fails 0/5 and the retained/reset pilot is null.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Extended upstream quantity/ROP/shift plus direct Op10/Op12 dispatch control

h_obs.policy: canonical joint PPO versus calibration-frozen same-contract constant

decision_families.strongest_comparator: calibration-only Sobol plus local-refinement constant over the full eight-dimensional contract
decision_families.resource_matching: same decision contract; resource totals still require policy-specific reporting for any future claim
decision_families.exact_failure: The historical positive result was relative to a restricted 147-cell frontier. A calibration-frozen constant spanning the learner's full contract beats PPO on 60 untouched tapes.

decision_families.primary_metric: ret_excel_visible_v1 (current governing metric; historical J_v3 evidence is secondary only)
decision_families.physical_mechanism: Campaign regimes, route-aware replenishment, priced holding/dispatch/shift resources, and buffer/shift/dispatch commitment
decision_families.decision_rights: Full Track-C contract tested first with exact/optimized constants and privileged or detector-triggered switchers

h_pi.warning: secondary priced endpoint, not canonical ReT-only Paper-2 confirmation

decision_families.strongest_comparator: Sobol/refined full-contract constant plus named Garrido clocks; five preregistered oracle/detector calibrations
decision_families.resource_matching: resources priced in J_v3; not an equal-vector resource proof for the current Paper-2 definition
decision_families.guardrail_result: all five oracle iterations remain below their preregistered materiality bars; no learner seed trained
decision_families.exact_failure: Even engineered nonstationarity and observable ramps yield at most a tiny switcher advantage; the preregistered pre-learner gate closes before PPO.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Backorder sequencing under the existing cap-60 pending-order list
decision_families.decision_rights: SPT, contingent-priority, FIFO/LPT and age-threshold service rules
decision_families.resource_matching: same order set and service capacity
decision_families.guardrail_result: oracle service-loss reduction approximately zero; observable tree increases lost orders by 23.25%
decision_families.exact_failure: Local ReT ranking reversals are too small and the deployable tree moves in the wrong direction relative to the robust SPT-flat doctrine.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Reallocatable downstream CSSU capacity plus order-priority doctrine
decision_families.decision_rights: CSSU A share and FIFO/SPT/R24-age service rule
decision_families.resource_matching: normalized allocation/share weights; exact mass balance
decision_families.guardrail_result: guardrails pass but diversity and magnitude fail
decision_families.exact_failure: After removal of prefix bias, the resource-equal CSSU action portfolio has negligible oracle value and inadequate material ranking diversity.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Finite convoy dispatch with hold/dispatch commitment
decision_families.decision_rights: Dispatch now or hold across exact finite-horizon sequences
decision_families.resource_matching: fails the current strict non-superior-total rule: DRA2 candidate means 12.55 departures and 592.4 unavailable-hours versus 12.25 and 574.0 for the comparator; DRA2b likewise used a historical envelope rather than exact equality
decision_families.guardrail_result: service-loss reduction 3.08%, below 5%; horizon-sufficiency gate fails
decision_families.exact_failure: Material ReT EVPI exists, but the finite sequence is horizon-sensitive, does not deliver the preregistered practical service effect, and does not satisfy the newer exact non-superior-resource definition.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Observable conversion of the DRA2b convoy contract
decision_families.decision_rights: MaskablePPO/tree/heuristic dispatch under the same convoy envelope
decision_families.strongest_comparator: static, heuristic, tree and frozen convex mixture
decision_families.guardrail_result: lost-order and tail gates pass; ReT, conversion, service and seed-majority gates fail
decision_families.exact_failure: A legitimate learner was trained, but no observable policy converted the DRA2b perfect-information headroom.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Finite budget tokens split among manufacturing, reserve and transport mitigation
decision_families.decision_rights: All same-budget integer portfolios with commitment dwell
decision_families.physical_liveness: all three levers live in all screened cells
decision_families.exact_failure: Oracle portfolio rankings diversify, but deployable context does not convert them beyond strong constant portfolios.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Two-CSSU scarce shared convoy with spatial commitments
decision_families.decision_rights: A/B/HOLD sequences and observable cover/tree/MPC policies

h_pi.metric: corrected canonical order metric, full-information relaxation completed in Program H

decision_families.guardrail_result: no observable policy passes ReT, quantity, attended, unfulfilled and worst-CSSU gates
decision_families.exact_failure: The service-loss proxy win reverses under canonical order ReT; the best periodic ABAB calendar dominates Program-G observable policies. The first Program-G ReT reanalysis used a 144-hour week and incorrect ledger update order, so only the terminal metric audit is canonical.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Belief filtering and lookahead on the frozen Program G spatial contract
decision_families.decision_rights: regret fitted-Q, belief MPC and point rollout
decision_families.strongest_comparator: ABAB plus belief MPC/point rollout and reference MPC
decision_families.guardrail_result: best policy favorable on 19%; worst-CSSU delta -0.0385; the H_PI UCB remains above 0.01, so formal information insufficiency is not proved
decision_families.exact_failure: A material full-information ceiling remains, but the informative filter and strong belief policies do not convert it and the formal information bound is not tight enough for impossibility.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Production posture, Op9 dispatch cadence and Op10/12 transport cadence
decision_families.decision_rights: three actions per family at 4- and 8-week branches
decision_families.strongest_comparator: family-specific best constant; full branch portfolio
decision_families.resource_matching: only transport is resource-equal; production and dispatch are diagnostic
decision_families.guardrail_result: all families fail ReT 0.01, service 5% and 90% horizon agreement gates
decision_families.exact_failure: Mutable thesis controls reverse locally, but the maximum screened oracle delta is about 253 times below the practical bar and none is horizon-stable enough for observable fitting.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Scarcity by concurrent two-CSSU demand regimes
decision_families.decision_rights: observable spatial policy over the Program G action set
decision_families.physical_liveness: live only on scarcity by concurrency interaction
decision_families.guardrail_result: worst-CSSU fill decreases 0.126-0.128 on fresh blocks
decision_families.exact_failure: The only OOS-stable positive H_obs cell buys aggregate ReT by starving one theatre; information quality, signal lead and risk magnitude are inert in this contract.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: Equal-budget maintenance allocation across serial Op5-Op7 WIP stations
decision_families.decision_rights: weekly maintenance target calendars, observable heuristics and PPO
decision_families.strongest_comparator: 1,041 periodic calendars; eight-week best static PM7-PM6-PM7-PM5-PM6-PM5-PM7-PM6
decision_families.guardrail_result: 0 of 108 phase-diagram cells pass; PPO beats static in 0 of 6 seeds
decision_families.exact_failure: Maintenance allocation is causal, but its canonical ReT ceiling is tiny and the serial line is best served by a robust periodic calendar.

decision_families.primary_metric: ret_excel_visible_v1 (current governing metric; short-shelf-life evidence is physically excluded)
decision_families.physical_mechanism: Age-sensitive inventory with a two-week shelf life
decision_families.guardrail_result: physical premise contradicts the thesis three-year non-perishable ration
decision_families.exact_failure: A short shelf life creates an adaptive inventory problem for a different product, not the Garrido combat ration.

decision_families.primary_metric: ret_excel_visible_v1 (current governing metric; historical cost-J evidence cannot promote)
decision_families.physical_mechanism: Three-year nonperishable replenishment with holding penalty and demand signal
decision_families.decision_rights: constant order, optimized base stock and signal MPC

h_pi.metric: cost J, best observable minus clairvoyant
h_pi.warning: Displayed aggregate J means imply an approximately 19777.9 MPC-to-clairvoyant gap; the 15820.2 decomposition appears to use per-tape ex-post policy selection and is not a deployable observable estimate.

decision_families.strongest_comparator: optimized base-stock S* plus constant order and signal MPC
decision_families.guardrail_result: large gap is EVPI; observable policies cluster
decision_families.exact_failure: The apparent 47% ceiling requires future demand; with thesis-compatible shelf life, strong base-stock and observable policies leave no material conversion case.

decision_families.primary_metric: ret_excel_visible_v1 (the exact full-ledger dominance proof is not assumed to transfer)
decision_families.decision_rights: weekly order multipliers under exact total and weekly caps

h_pi.visible_v1_scope: not certified and F is not a universal upper comparator: a feasible exact-budget q with q prefix-dominated by F, identical lost order 8 and weakly later completions scores visible-v1 1.0 versus F 6/7 because the sparse ledger rewards same-time batching; this is an open-loop metric counterexample, not H_PI or H_obs

decision_families.strongest_comparator: unique prefix-nondominated full-horizon F=(1.5,1.5,1.5,1.5,1.5,1.5,1.0,0.0)*D0; exact graph covers all 6,371 forced-exact-budget schedules and the separate budget-envelope DP covers all 5,758,374 schedules spending at most B
decision_families.resource_matching: exact for the frozen policy graph and fixed-versus-MPC ordered-D0 delta 0; under-spending calendars are non-superior-resource alternatives, not called pairwise equal-resource
decision_families.guardrail_result: F uses exactly 10*D0, pathwise weakly improves completion/backlog/loss over every equal-budget trajectory, reproduces PPO, and beats the tested MPC. Full-ledger dominance is exact. Canonical sparse visible-v1 is nonmonotone even with identical losses: a feasible later-batching open loop scores 1.0 versus F 6/7, so no canonical H_PI/H_obs conclusion is inferred from the theorem or counterexample.
decision_families.exact_failure: The learner rediscovers F, the unique prefix-nondominated schedule. Source-bound enumeration proves F dominates all 6,371 exact-budget trajectories; an additional exact DP covers all 5,758,374 grid calendars spending at most B with zero prefix violations. Therefore H_PI=Hobs=0 only for the frozen full-ledger metric. The feasible batching counterexample prevents promotion of this theorem to ret_excel_visible_v1 and independently shows why metric ranking is not physical service ranking.

decision_families.physical_mechanism: One equal-cost response team allocated among manufacturing, LOC and mission response
decision_families.strongest_comparator: UNRESOLVED: exact maximum over all 11,184,811 admissible 24-week open-loop calendars is required. The complete 11,611-calendar <=3-switch calibration frontier passed watched production and full deep replay, but its unique winner uses all three switches. The complete 89,131-calendar <=4-switch producer is running after a passed VPS preflight and is not evidence until terminal custody validation and independent deep replay pass.
decision_families.resource_matching: the frozen contract matches one 4032-hour response-team budget and identical reserve access by construction; M/T/R are mutually exclusive allocation destinations, not separate purchased resources. Reserve issue/replenishment/request counts are conserved endogenous outcome flows in v1. Real transport/handling scarcity and cross-target team fungibility remain unresolved Garrido domain facts.
decision_families.guardrail_result: service loss worsens 3.03%; favorable tapes 53.3%; 120/120 signal trajectories are unique but calibration-derived calendar and phase replacements also fail
decision_families.exact_failure: The tested signal policy does not outperform the manufacturing doctrine and worsens service loss, but that is not H_obs and does not close the family. The complete <=3-switch comparator is boundary-active. The running <=4 shell has no result and cannot be treated as evidence; even a valid replayed result is not the full frontier or PI ceiling. The family remains active until a valid upper ceiling/full bound and the domain resource facts are resolved.

phase0_gate.next_step: Freeze candidate-family theory tests and intervention-ledger requirements before implementation.
